name: prism
description: The proof layer for AI-generated software. A verification gate between a coding agent finishing and the work being merged: independently re-checks every claim against the live repo and current docs, runs a decorrelated skeptic panel, and emits a Proof Packet with an accept / human-review / block verdict. Ships the /prism-verify skill (auto-invoked after a diff), the full Prism command lifecycle, and the one-way-door guard hook.
